case_title: STEADI SYSTEMS VS HOT HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOT HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $433.67 FILED BY STEADI SYSTEMS AS TO DEFENDANT HOT HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
